summary: Tested Razorpay Subscription API endpoints. All 28 tests passed after fixing a bug in admin endpoint authorization. The admin endpoints were checking for 'role' field which doesn't exist in the database - fixed to check 'is_admin' field instead.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Admin endpoints in subscriptions.py were checking current_user.get('role') != 'admin' but the 'role' field is computed in /api/auth/me endpoint, not stored in database. Changed to check 'is_admin' field which is stored in the database.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and subscription plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay Subscription API fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/subscriptions/plans (returns 3 plans: basic_plan, pro_plan, pro_plus), GET /api/subscriptions/status (returns user subscription status), POST /api/subscriptions/create (creates Razorpay subscription - LIVE mode), POST /api/subscriptions/cancel, POST /api/subscriptions/reactivate, POST /api/subscriptions/change-plan, POST /api/subscriptions/cancel-scheduled-change, POST /api/subscriptions/activate, Admin endpoints: GET /api/subscriptions/admin/user/{user_id}, POST /api/subscriptions/admin/extend/{user_id}. Note: The create endpoint creates REAL subscriptions in Razorpay live mode.

GET /api/subscriptions/plans.details: Returns 3 subscription plans (basic_plan, pro_plan, pro_plus) with monthly and 6-month pricing

GET /api/subscriptions/status.details: Returns user subscription status, requires authentication

POST /api/subscriptions/create.details: Creates Razorpay subscription, returns subscription_id and short_url for payment

POST /api/subscriptions/cancel.details: Cancels subscription at cycle end, requires active subscription

POST /api/subscriptions/reactivate.details: Reactivates cancelled subscription, requires cancelled state

POST /api/subscriptions/change-plan.details: Handles upgrades (immediate) and downgrades (scheduled), requires active subscription

POST /api/subscriptions/cancel-scheduled.details: Cancels pending plan change, requires pending change

POST /api/subscriptions/activate.details: Activates subscription after payment, handles pending subscription states

GET /api/subscriptions/admin/user/{user_.details: Returns user subscription details and billing history, requires admin

POST /api/subscriptions/admin/extend/{us.details: Extends user subscription period, requires admin and existing subscription

bugs_fixed.issue: Admin endpoints checking 'role' field instead of 'is_admin' field
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed admin check from current_user.get('role') != 'admin' to (not current_user.get('is_admin') and current_user.get('role') != 'admin')
